benefits.description: Compounds work synergistically with effects lasting about one day, suggesting twice-daily dosing maintains continuous activity

protocol_notes: Recommends 100-150mcg of each compound twice daily (morning and before bed). Can be mixed in same syringe. Morning dose recommended as pre-workout if exercising. Fasting: 30 minutes before injection preferred (not 4 hours necessary). Before bed: 1-2 hours fasting sufficient. Notes compounds work synergistically with ~24-hour activity window, suggesting night injection may be particularly important.
